name: Potato and Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare cooked potatoes by peeling and dicing. Slice the hard-boiled eggs; chop the onions.
2. Prepare a thin white sauce. In a heavy skillet, melt 6 tablespoons of margarine. Blend in 3 tablespoons of flour with a wire whisk. Slowly pour in 3 cups of milk, stirring constantly. Cook for 2 minutes.
3. In a 2-quart casserole, layer the potatoes, eggs, onions, and salt and pepper to taste. Make 3 layers. Pour the hot white sauce over the top and sprinkle with bread crumbs mixed with melted margarine. Bake in an oven preheated to 350 degrees for 1 hour.
